mapper.sql: id, order_id, uuid, email, user_ip, file_url, format, quality, watermark_type, watermark_text, status, oss_url, reset_count, error_message, create_time, modify_time, creator, modifier, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tasks WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM tasks WHERE status = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET status = 0, reset_count = reset_count + 1, error_message = NULL, modify_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tasks SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, modify_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tasks SET oss_url = #{ossUrl}, modify_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',
-- 业务字段 order_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '关联的订单ID', uuid VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务UUID（唯一标识）', email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '接收邮箱', user_ip VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '用户IP地址', file_url VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件链接地址', format VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'png' COMMENT '导出格式：png, jpg, pdf, svg, visio', quality VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'high' COMMENT '导出品质：high-高清, standard-标准', watermark_type VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'none' COMMENT '水印类型：none-无水印, default-默认水印, custom-自定义水印', watermark_text VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '水印文案（自定义水印时填写）', status TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '任务状态：0-待执行，1-执行中，2-执行成功，3-执行异常，4-待交付，5-已交付', oss_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'OSS文件地址', reset_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '任务重置次数', error_message TEXT COMMENT '错误信息',
-- 标准字段 create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', modify_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '修改时间', creator VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人', modifier VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '修改人', deleted TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '逻辑删除：0-未删除，1-已删除',
-- 索引 UNIQUE KEY uk_uuid (uuid) COMMENT 'UUID唯一索引', INDEX idx_order_id (order_id) COMMENT '订单ID索引', INDEX idx_status (status) COMMENT '状态索引', INDEX idx_email (email) COMMENT '邮箱索引', INDEX idx_create_time (create_time) COMMENT '创建时间索引', INDEX idx_modify_time (modify_time) COMMENT '修改时间索引' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='任务表'
